entries.title: SEC delays tokenized asset exemption amid concerns over third-party tokens
entries.snippet: The SEC has delayed its plan for an anticipated exemption that would clarify the agency's stance on tokenized assets, Bloomberg Law reported.
entries.tweet_text: SEC delays tokenized asset exemption amid concerns over third-party tokens

entries.title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
entries.snippet: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.
entries.tweet_text: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with @okx

entries.title: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets
entries.snippet: Institutional crypto adoption accelerates as Tether expands Bitcoin holdings, miners pivot to AI and Polymarket joins Nasdaq amid $1 billion fund outflows.

entries.title: TBC Georgia adds crypto trading to banking app
entries.snippet: TBC Georgia, a leading financial services provider in the South Caucasus country and part of London-listed TBC Bank Group, announces the launch of a new cryptocurrency trading feature in its digital banking app.

entries.title: Ethereum Crypto Influencer Game 'Fantasy Top' Shutting Down
entries.snippet: Fantasy Top, a game that reimagines fantasy sports through the lens of Crypto Twitter, will close down two years after its hot launch.

entries.title: Crypto platforms rush to launch derivatives linked to SpaceX
entries.snippet: Binance among exchanges to offer so-called perpetual futures to speculate on price of rocket company’s upcoming IPO

entries.title: Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO
entries.snippet: The crypto exchange's new pre-IPO futures product lets traders speculate on SpaceX’s expected public market valuation before the company begins trading on public exchanges.

entries.title: Hyperliquid ETFs surprise with 50% volume jump after slow launch
entries.snippet: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says crypto and traditional assets are trading down while Hyperliquid is up, leading to a boon for ETFs tied to the token.

entries.title: Franklin Templeton taps DigiFT to distribute BENJI tokenized MMF in Asia
entries.snippet: Franklin Templeton has partnered with Singapore based DigiFT to distribute its BENJI tokenized money market funds to accredited and institutional investors across Asia. DigiFT holds Capital Markets Services and Recognised Market Operator licenses from the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS). The B
entries.tweet_text: @FTI_US taps DigiFT to distribute BENJI tokenized MMF in Asia

entries.title: Variational Raises $50 Million for On-Chain Derivatives Protocol
entries.snippet: On-chain derivatives trading protocol Variational has raised $50 million in new funding. entries.title: IG Europe taps Bitpanda to expand crypto trading across Europe
entries.snippet: IG Group, which launched spot crypto in the UK last year, is bringing the service to European investors through Bitpanda’s infrastructure.

entries.title: Blockchain.com confidentially files for US IPO as crypto firms continue public market push
entries.snippet: Blockchain.com confidentially filed with the SEC for an IPO, joining Circle, Gemini, and BitGo in crypto's sustained public markets push.
entries.tweet_text: Blockchain.com confidentially files for US IPO as crypto firms continue public market push

entries.title: Boerse Stuttgart taps SocGen, flatexDEGIRO for EU blockchain settlement push
entries.snippet: Boerse Stuttgart’s Seturion has partnered with Societe Generale, SG-FORGE and flatexDEGIRO to build a pan-European blockchain securities settlement system.
entries.tweet_text: Boerse Stuttgart taps SocGen, flatexDEGIRO for EU blockchain settlement push

entries.title: OSL Strengthens Asia's Digital Asset Ecosystem with Listing of State-Supervised Gold-Backed Stablecoin USDKG
entries.snippet: OSL Group (863.HK) (OSL), a global stablecoin payment and trading platform, today announced that its Hong Kong-licensed digital asset exchange OSL HK has officially listed USDKG, the gold-backed stablecoin issued by the Kyrgyz Republic.

entries.title: AllUnity preps Swedish krona-backed stablecoin
entries.snippet: German firm AllUnity is set to launch the world's first Swedish krona-backed stablecoin and is also making a move into agentic payments.

entries.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip 'for enabling scams'
entries.snippet: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

entries.title: EU Reconsiders MiCA Regulation as Crypto Evolves
entries.snippet: European regulators want to know if their 2024 cryptocurrency regulations still apply to the 2026 crypto landscape. With that in mind, the European Commission announced Wednesday (May 20) that it has launched a consultation to get feedback from stakeholders and the general public on the functioning

entries.title: Kik founder's latest app Flipcash first to tap Coinbase's stablecoin-as-a-service platform
entries.snippet: Coinbase rolled out its Custom Stablecoin platform in late 2025 to enable companies to launch branded stablecoins.
entries.tweet_text: Kik founder's latest app Flipcash first to tap @coinbase's stablecoin-as-a-service platform

entries.title: Securitize posts record Q1 revenue, $3.4 billion in tokenized assets under management
entries.snippet: Securitize said it now services roughly 650 active funds and processed $1.9 billion in transaction volume during the quarter.

entries.title: MoneyGram becomes Tempo's anchor remittance validator
entries.snippet: MoneyGram today announced a partnership with Tempo, a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain for high-volume, real-world payments, to deepen its blockchain infrastructure and advance stablecoin-based settlement across its global network.

entries.title: Crypto custody firm Copper is looking to sell the company for $500 million
Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
entries.snippet: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

entries.title: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms' Access to Master Accounts
entries.snippet: The order asks the Fed to review crypto firms’ access to payment rails, putting its control over master accounts under scrutiny.
entries.tweet_text: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms' Access to Master Accounts

entries.title: European Commission launches MiCA review as global crypto regulatory landscape shifts
entries.snippet: The European Commission launched a MiCA consultation open through Aug. 31, asking whether the crypto framework needs updating.

entries.title: Digital asset firm Checker raises $8 million
entries.snippet: Checker, a global network that enables financial institutions to plug into stablecoins and digital asset liquidity, cross-border payments, treasury, and credit via a single API, announced today that it has raised $8M in funding from Galaxy Ventures, Al Mada Ventures, and Framework Ventures.

entries.title: Deel launches stablecoin salary payouts and appoints head of crypto
entries.snippet: Deel, the global people platform trusted by 40,000+ businesses to hire, manage, and pay teams across 150+ countries, today launched stablecoin salary payouts and announced the formation of a dedicated crypto division, headed by Thierry Edde as Head of Crypto at Deel.

entries.title: Kaiko acquires DeFi blockchain firm Cometh
entries.snippet: Kaiko, the global leader in market data, analytics, indices, and onchain data infrastructure for digital assets, today announced the acquisition of Cometh, a MiCA/CASP-licensed European provider of regulated financial services specialising in decentralised finance infrastructure

entries.title: Ethereum leads $65 billion RWA race as blockchains compete for institutional tokenization flows
entries.snippet: The distributed market structure suggests the RWA landscape has not yet consolidated around a clear winner.

entries.title: Tokenized equities daily volume hits all-time high of $3.57 billion
entries.snippet: The Block's data shows onchain equities trading volume growing since the start of the year, and hitting an all-time high on Monday.

entries.title: Stablecoin supply tops $300 billion but growth stalls as Tether gains at rivals' expense
entries.snippet: The bank-issued and GENIUS Act-compliant stablecoin entrants have had a harder start than many expected.

entries.title: Former BNY exec launches NUVA, bets tokenization will remake Wall Street
Senator Warren criticizes OCC over Ripple, Coinbase and other crypto trust charters
entries.snippet: Last year, the OCC granted conditional approvals to Circle, Ripple, BitGo, Fidelity, and Paxos, as well as other firms more recently.

entries.snippet: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

entries.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana's Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
entries.snippet: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.

entries.title: Morning Minute: SEC Reverses Course on Tokenized Stocks, HYPE Soars
entries.snippet: HYPE soared as the SEC opened the door to third-party tokenized stocks. Strategy bought another $2B in BTC, and price still went lower.

entries.title: Stripe-Backed Tempo Expands Into Lending With Morpho Integration
entries.snippet: Tempo is expanding its push into institutional stablecoin infrastructure by adding decentralized lending and yield capabilities to its blockchain. entries.title: SEC to propose tokenized stock framework as Wall Street efforts deepen
UK Regulators Unveil Blueprint for Asset Tokenization in Wholesale Markets
entries.snippet: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) and the Bank of England on Monday (May 18) issued a joint framework to accelerate tokenization within the U.K.’s wholesale financial markets. The initiative seeks to provide the regulatory and technical certainty institutional firms require to transition digital

entries.title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
entries.snippet: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

entries.title: Revolut unveils first physical crypto card as industry-wide card usage grows
entries.snippet: The card will be usable anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted, and will first roll out firm in the UK and EEA.
entries.tweet_text: @RevolutApp unveils first physical crypto card as industry-wide card usage grows

entries.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
entries.snippet: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

Bank of England, FCA launch consultation on tokenized UK wholesale markets

entries.title: Standard Chartered projects $4T in tokenized assets by end-2028, with DeFi protocols primary beneficiaries
entries.snippet: Standard Chartered projects $4 trillion in tokenized assets by the end of 2028, with DeFi protocols positioned to benefit most.

entries.title: Digital Assets Clearing Center secures $10 million investment
entries.snippet: Digital Asset Clearing Center (DACC.HK), a next-generation financial market infrastructure for the tokenized economy, today announced US$10 million in funding from strategic partners including Conflux, Transaction Technologies Limited (“TTL”) and Global InfoTech.

entries.title: AFX launches sovereign Layer 1, providing an optimized execution environment for on-chain perp DEXes
entries.snippet: AFX, a sovereign Layer 1 purpose-built for decentralized derivatives trading, has officially commenced the operation of its L1 Mainnet, signaling a definitive end to the era of trade execution compromised by general-purpose blockchain congestion.

entries.title: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to a potential launch
entries.snippet: The US securities regulator approved 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF last week, adding to a growing number of cryptocurrencies converted into ETF wrappers in the US.

entries.title: KuCoin Australia's 'Evolution' Showcases Regulatory Focus, Mastercard Launch
entries.snippet: The exchange’s KuCard rollout enables users to make "seamless payments" to Mastercard merchants using USDC.

entries.title: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura line up to launch crypto investment trusts: Report
entries.snippet: Japan’s biggest brokerages are racing to bring crypto investment trusts to retail investors, as regulators move to formally allow crypto-holding funds by 2028.
